recommended_next_actions.action: Dispatch J — spatial_backfill nearest-district fallback. PR #172 merged 2026-06-02 as 84d8263. Live on main.

Dispatch O — Hackensack Mapbox georef refit. Geocoding worked 10/10 but vision-LLM cannot localize landmarks to pixel coordinates accurately enough (RMS 162m vs <30m target, spot-check 0/10). Preview rolled back to CP3 v1 baseline. Hackensack-class raster munis route to operator-assisted Op-5.

Dispatch P — final re-validation gate. PASSED 2026-06-04. Fort Lee 67.8%/84.1% coverage at 50m/200m; Garfield 75.0%/93.2%; bound-only accuracy 17/17 (100%) across both towns. GO WITH RASTER CARVE-OUT decision recorded in docs/OP5_PROOF_DECISION.md.

Op-5 factory pre-build A-D per docs/OP5_FACTORY_72H_PLAN.md before H+0. Generalize Op-5 proof orchestrator into per-county runner (op5_factory_orchestrator.py + op5_discovery_classify.py + op5_per_muni_runner.py). Build review queue UI at /admin/op5-review.
